q: India ka Rashtreey Pakshi (National Bird) kaun sa hai?
d: Mor (Peacock) ko 1963 mein India ka Rashtreey Pakshi ghoshit kiya gaya. Yeh apni sundar pankh aur rang-birangi chhata ke liye mashoor hai. Iska scientific naam Pavo cristatus hai. Yeh bharatiya sanskriti mein bhi bahut mahatva rakhta hai.

q: India ki Rajdhani kya hai?
d: New Delhi bharat ki rajdhani aur ek union territory hai. Yeh 1911 mein British Raj ke dauran Calcutta ki jagah rajdhani bani. Yahan Rashtrapati Bhavan, Parliament House aur Supreme Court sthit hain. Yeh Yamuna nadi ke kinare basa hua hai.

q: Sabse bada Grah (Planet) kaun sa hai?
d: Jupiter hamare solar system ka sabse bada grah hai. Iska diameter Prithvi se lagbhag 11 guna zyada hai. Isme 95 se zyada chaand hain. Yeh mainly hydrogen aur helium gas se bana hai aur ise 'Gas Giant' bhi kehte hain.

q: Manushya ke sharir mein kitni haddiyan (Bones) hoti hain?
d: Ek vayask manushya ke sharir mein 206 haddiyan hoti hain. Janm ke samay bachche mein 270-300 haddiyan hoti hain jo baad mein aapas mein jud jaati hain. Sabse chhoti haddi kaan mein stapes hai. Sabse lambi haddi jaangh mein femur hai.

q: Duniya ka sabse lamba dariya (River) kaun sa hai?
d: Nile dariya 6,650 km lambi hai aur yeh duniya ki sabse lambi nadi mani jaati hai. Yeh Africa mein hai aur Egypt se hokar Mediterranean Sea mein girti hai. Amazon duniya ki doosri sabse lambi nadi hai. Nile ke kinare hi Egypt ki prachin sabhyata phali-phuli thi.

q: Cricket mein ek Over mein kitni Balls hoti hain?
d: Cricket mein ek over mein 6 valid balls hoti hain. Agar no-ball ya wide ball ho to extra ball deni padti hai. Pehle ek over mein 4 ya 8 balls bhi hoti thi lekin 1979 mein 6 balls standard ban gaya. Over ek hi bowler dwara complete kiya jata hai.

q: Surya (Sun) kya hai?
d: Surya ek madhyam aakaar ka tara (star) hai jo Milky Way galaxy mein sthit hai. Iska temperature lagbhag 15 million degrees Celsius hai. Yeh mainly hydrogen aur helium se bana hai. Prithvi se iska distance lagbhag 15 crore kilometer hai.

q: Pani ka Chemical Formula kya hai?
d: Pani ka chemical formula H2O hai - matlab do hydrogen atom aur ek oxygen atom. Yeh ek colourless, odourless liquid hai. Pani ka boiling point 100°C aur freezing point 0°C hota hai. Zameen ka lagbhag 71% hissa paani se dhaka hua hai.

q: India ne pehli baar Cricket World Cup kab jeeta?
d: India ne 1983 mein Kapil Dev ki captaincy mein apna pehla Cricket World Cup jeeta tha. Final mein India ne West Indies ko 43 runs se haraaya tha. Yeh bahut bada upset tha kyunki West Indies us samay best team thi. Kapil Dev ki 175 runs ki innings bahut yaadgaar rahi.

q: Sabse chhota Planet kaun sa hai?
d: Mercury hamare solar system ka sabse chhota aur Suraj ke sabse kareeb planet hai. Iska ek din (rotation) Prithvi ke 59 din ke barabar hai. Wahan koi atmosphere nahi hai isliye temperature -180°C se 430°C tak jata hai. Pluto ko 2006 mein planet ki list se hata diya gaya.

q: India ka Rashtreey Khel (National Game) kaun sa hai?
d: Hockey India ka Rashtreey Khel hai. India ne Olympic mein hockey mein 8 gold medals jeete hain jo sabse zyada hain. 1928 se 1956 tak India ne lagatar 6 Olympic gold medals jeete. Major Dhyan Chand ko 'Hockey ka Jadugar' kaha jata hai.

q: Taj Mahal kahan sthit hai?
d: Taj Mahal Agra, Uttar Pradesh mein Yamuna nadi ke kinare sthit hai. Isse Mughal Emperor Shah Jahan ne apni begum Mumtaz Mahal ki yaad mein 1632-1653 ke beech banwaya tha. Yeh safed sangmarmar se bana hai aur duniya ke saat ajoobon mein shaamil hai. Lagbhag 20,000 karigar isme lage the.

q: Computer ka Brain kise kehte hain?
d: CPU (Central Processing Unit) ko computer ka brain kaha jata hai. Yeh sabhi calculations aur instructions process karta hai. Aaj ke modern CPUs mein billions of transistors hote hain. Intel aur AMD duniya ke do sabse bade CPU manufacturers hain.

q: Google ke founder kaun hain?
d: Google ko Larry Page aur Sergey Brin ne 1998 mein Stanford University mein apne PhD project ke roop mein shuru kiya. Pehle iska naam 'BackRub' tha. Google naam 'Googol' se liya gaya hai jo 10 ki power 100 hota hai. Aaj Google duniya ka sabse zyada use hone wala search engine hai.

q: Duniya ka sabse bada Mahasagar (Ocean) kaun sa hai?
d: Pacific Ocean duniya ka sabse bada aur gehra mahasagar hai. Iska area lagbhag 16.52 crore square kilometer hai jo baki sabhi oceans se zyada hai. Isme duniya ki sabse gehri jagah Mariana Trench hai jo 11,034 meter gehri hai. Ferdinand Magellan pehle European the jo Pacific cross kiya.

q: Olympic Games kitne saal mein ek baar hote hain?
d: Modern Olympic Games har 4 saal mein ek baar hote hain. Pehle Modern Olympics 1896 mein Athens, Greece mein hue the. Summer aur Winter Olympics alag-alag hote hain. COVID-19 ki wajah se 2020 Tokyo Olympics 2021 mein hue the.

q: India ka sabse lamba railway station kaun sa hai?
d: Gorakhpur railway station, Uttar Pradesh mein, duniya ka sabse lamba railway platform hai. Iska platform 1.3 kilometer (1366 meter) lamba hai. Yeh Guinness World Record mein registered hai. Indian Railways duniya ka chautha sabse bada rail network hai.

q: WhatsApp ke founder kaun hain?
d: WhatsApp ko Jan Koum aur Brian Acton ne 2009 mein banaya. Dono pehle Yahoo mein kaam karte the. 2014 mein Facebook (ab Meta) ne isse $19 billion mein kharida. Aaj WhatsApp ke 2 billion se zyada active users hain.

q: Prithvi apni dhari par ek chakkar kitne ghante mein lagati hai?
d: Prithvi apni axis par ek chakkar lagbhag 23 ghante 56 minute mein lagati hai jise sidereal day kehte hain. Hum ise 24 ghante maan kar chalte hain. Isi rotation ki wajah se din aur raat hote hain. Prithvi west se east ki taraf rotate karti hai.

q: Sabse bada desert kaun sa hai?
d: Sahara Desert duniya ka sabse bada garam desert hai jo Africa mein sthit hai. Iska area lagbhag 92 lakh square kilometer hai. Lekin agar thande deserts bhi count karein to Antarctic Desert sabse bada hai. Thar Desert India ka sabse bada desert hai.

q: India mein kitne States hain (2024)?
d: 2024 mein India mein 28 States aur 8 Union Territories hain. 2019 mein Jammu & Kashmir ko 2 Union Territories (J&K aur Ladakh) mein convert kiya gaya. Telangana 2014 mein bana sabse naya state tha. India ek federal republic hai jahan states ko khud ki government hoti hai.

q: Sabse tez daudne wala janwar kaun sa hai?
d: Cheetah zameen par sabse tez daudne wala janwar hai jo 112-120 km/h tak ki speed pakad sakta hai. Yeh apni speed 3 seconds mein 0 se 96 km/h tak pahuncha sakta hai. Lekin yeh sirf thodi der ke liye itna tez daud sakta hai. Cheetah India mein extinct ho gaya tha aur 2022 mein Namibia se dobara laaya gaya.

q: Light ki speed kitni hai?
d: Prakaash (Light) ki speed vacuum mein lagbhag 299,792 km/s hoti hai jise hum 3 lakh km/s kehte hain. Albert Einstein ne bataya ki koi bhi cheez light se tez nahi ja sakti. Suraj ki roshni Prithvi tak pahunchne mein lagbhag 8 minute 20 second lagte hain. Isko 'c' se represent karte hain.

q: India ke pratham Prime Minister kaun the?
d: Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru India ke pehle Prime Minister the jo 15 August 1947 ko aagrahi hue. Unka janam 14 November 1889 ko hua tha jise Children's Day ke roop mein manaya jata hai. Unka mashoor bhashan 'Tryst with Destiny' aaj bhi yaad kiya jata hai. Wo 1964 mein apni mrityu tak PM rahe.

q: Android OS kisne banaya?
d: Android OS originally Andy Rubin ne 2003 mein banaya tha. 2005 mein Google ne isse khareed liya. Pehla commercial Android phone HTC Dream tha jo 2008 mein aaya. Aaj Android duniya mein sabse zyada istemaal hone wala mobile OS hai jis par 70% se zyada phones chalte hain.

q: Duniya ka sabse uncha parvat kaun sa hai?
d: Mount Everest 8,849 meter (29,032 feet) ki unchaai ke saath duniya ka sabse uncha parvat hai. Yeh Nepal aur Tibet ki seema par sthit hai. Edmund Hillary aur Tenzing Norgay ne 29 May 1953 ko pehli baar summit kiya tha. Iska Nepali naam Sagarmatha aur Tibetan naam Chomolungma hai.

q: Manushya ke dil mein kitne chambers hote hain?
d: Manushya ke dil mein 4 chambers hote hain - 2 Atria (upper) aur 2 Ventricles (lower). Left ventricle sabse zyada kaam karta hai kyunki yeh pure sharir mein blood pump karta hai. Dil ek minute mein lagbhag 60-100 baar dhadakta hai. Ek din mein dil lagbhag 1 lakh baar pump karta hai.

q: Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi kaunsi hai?
d: Ganga (2525 km) Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi hai jo Uttarakhand ke Gangotri glacier se nikalti hai. Yeh Uttar Pradesh, Bihar aur Bengal se hokar Bay of Bengal mein girti hai. Ganga ko Hinduon ki pavitra nadi mana jata hai. Ise 2008 mein National River of India ghoshit kiya gaya.

q: Computer ka avishkar kisne kiya?
d: Charles Babbage (1791-1871) ko 'Father of Computer' kaha jata hai. Unhone 'Analytical Engine' ka design banaya jo pehla mechanical computer tha. Ada Lovelace pehli computer programmer thi jo Babbage ke saath kaam karti thi. Modern computers ka vikas Alan Turing ke kaam par aadharit hai.

q: Suraj ke sabse kareeb kaunsa grah hai?
d: Budh (Mercury) Suraj ke sabse kareeb grah hai. Iska Suraj se average distance 5.79 crore kilometer hai. Lekin Shukra (Venus) ka temperature sabse zyada hai kyunki uska dense atmosphere hai. Mercury par ek saal sirf 88 Prithvi din ka hota hai.

q: ISRO ka mukhyalay kahan hai?
d: ISRO (Indian Space Research Organisation) ka mukhyalay Bengaluru, Karnataka mein hai. Isko 1969 mein Vikram Sarabhai ne establish kiya tha. ISRO ne Chandrayaan, Mangalyaan aur Aditya-L1 jaise missions safaltapurvak kiye hain. Chandrayaan-3 ne 2023 mein South Pole par landing ki jo duniya mein pehli baar hua.

q: Vande Mataram kisne likha tha?
d: Vande Mataram Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay ne apne novel 'Anandamath' (1882) mein likha tha. Yeh Bharat ka Rashtreey Geet hai. Jana Gana Mana (Rabindranath Tagore) Rashtreey Gaan hai. Vande Mataram ko pehli baar 1896 mein Indian National Congress mein gaya gaya tha.

q: Cricket World Cup 2011 kisne jeeta?
d: India ne 2011 Cricket World Cup Mahendra Singh Dhoni ki captaincy mein jeeta. Final Mumbai ke Wankhede Stadium mein Sri Lanka ke khilaf khela gaya. Dhoni ne final mein match-winning 91 not out ki innings kheli. Yeh India ka doosra World Cup tha, pehla 1983 mein jeeta tha.

q: Vitamin C ka sabse accha source kya hai?
d: Amla (Indian Gooseberry) mein sabse zyada Vitamin C hoti hai. 100 gram amle mein lagbhag 600-700 mg Vitamin C hoti hai jo orange se 20 guna zyada hai. Vitamin C immunity badhata hai aur scurvy bimari se bachata hai. Yeh ek powerful antioxidant bhi hai.

q: Bharat ke Iron Man kise kaha jata hai?
d: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel ko 'Bharat ke Iron Man' aur 'Sardar' kaha jata hai. Unhone Azadi ke baad 562 riyasaton ko Bharat mein milaya. Unka janam 31 October 1875 ko hua tha jo Rashtriya Ekta Diwas ke roop mein manaya jata hai. Statue of Unity (597 meter) unhi ki yaad mein Gujarat mein bani hai.

q: Sabse chota desh kaunsa hai?
d: Vatican City duniya ka sabse chhota desh hai jo sirf 0.44 square kilometer mein hai. Yeh Rome, Italy ke andar sthit hai. Yahan Pope ka niwas hai aur yeh Catholic Church ka centre hai. Iska apna TV station, radio, post office aur bank hai.

q: Japan ki rajdhani kya hai?
d: Tokyo Japan ki rajdhani aur duniya ke sabse bade metropolitan areas mein se ek hai. Isme 37 million se zyada log rehte hain. Yeh apni technology, anime, sushi aur sakura (cherry blossom) ke liye mashoor hai. Tokyo 1964 aur 2020 (2021) mein Olympics ka host raha hai.

q: Hawa Mahal kahan sthit hai?
d: Hawa Mahal Jaipur, Rajasthan mein sthit hai. Isse 1799 mein Maharaja Sawai Pratap Singh ne banwaya tha. Iske 953 chhoti jharokhe hain jisse thandi hawa andar aati hai isliye iska naam Hawa Mahal pada. Yeh lal aur gulabi sandstone se bana hai aur Jaipur ko 'Pink City' kehne ka ek karan bhi yahi hai.

q: Facebook ke founder kaun hain?
d: Mark Zuckerberg ne 2004 mein Harvard University mein Facebook banaya. Pehle iska naam 'TheFacebook' tha. Eduardo Saverin, Andrew McCollum, Dustin Moskovitz aur Chris Hughes bhi co-founders the. 2021 mein company ka naam Facebook se Meta Platforms rakha gaya.

q: Sabse pehla Bharat Ratna kise mila?
d: Bharat Ratna India ka sabse bada civilian award hai. Pehla Bharat Ratna 1954 mein teen logon ko mila: C. Rajagopalachari, S. Radhakrishnan aur C.V. Raman. Dr. S. Radhakrishnan baad mein India ke doosre Rashtrapati bane. Abhi tak 48 logon ko Bharat Ratna diya ja chuka hai.

q: Bihar ki rajdhani kya hai?
d: Patna Bihar ki rajdhani hai jo Ganga nadi ke kinare sthit hai. Prachin kaal mein iska naam Pataliputra tha aur yeh Maurya Samrajya ki rajdhani thi. Jharkhand 2000 mein Bihar se alag hua toh Ranchi Jharkhand ki rajdhani bani. Patna ka pura naam pehle Azimabad bhi tha.

q: Solar system mein kitne grah hain?
d: 2006 mein International Astronomical Union ne Pluto ko dwarf planet declare kiya tab se solar system mein officially 8 grah hain. Mercury, Venus, Prithvi, Mangal, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus aur Neptune. Sabse duur ka grah Neptune hai. Pluto ki khoj 1930 mein Clyde Tombaugh ne ki thi.

q: Taj Mahal kis nadi ke kinare hai?
d: Taj Mahal Agra mein Yamuna nadi ke kinare sthit hai. Shah Jahan ne 1632 mein iska nirman shuru karwaya jo 1653 mein pura hua. Isme lagbhag 20,000 karigar aur kaarigar lage the. Safed sangmarmar par precious stones jaise jade, crystal, turquoise aur amethyst se kaam kiya gaya hai.

q: Zero (0) ka avishkar kisne kiya?
d: Aryabhatta ek mahan Indian mathematician aur astronomer the jo 476 CE mein paida hue. Unhone shunya (0) ki concept ka avishkar kiya jo mathematics ki sabse important discoveries mein se ek hai. Unhone yeh bhi bataya ki Prithvi apni axis par ghoomti hai. Unke naam par ISRO ka satellite Aryabhatta bhi rakha gaya.

q: Shatranj (Chess) ki shuruat kahan hui?
d: Chess ka avishkar India mein 6th century AD mein hua. Pehle ise 'Chaturanga' kaha jata tha. Yahan se yeh Persia gaya jahan iska naam 'Chatrang' pada. Phir Arab aur Europe mein phela. World Chess Federation (FIDE) ka gathan 1924 mein hua. Vishwanathan Anand India ke world champion hain.

q: Kolkata kis nadi ke kinare hai?
d: Kolkata (pehle Calcutta) Hooghly nadi ke kinare sthit hai jo Ganga ki ek distributary hai. Yeh 1690 mein Job Charnock ne British East India Company ke liye establish ki thi. 1911 tak yeh British India ki rajdhani thi. Yahan Rabindranath Tagore, Mother Teresa aur Subhash Chandra Bose jaise mahapurushon ka sambandh raha hai.

q: Titanic kis saal duba tha?
d: RMS Titanic 14-15 April 1912 ki raat North Atlantic Ocean mein ek iceberg se takrakar dub gaya. Yeh us samay ka sabse bada aur advanced ship tha. Isme 2,224 log the jisme se lagbhag 1,500 log mare. Yeh apni pehli hi yatra par England se America ja raha tha.

q: Gateway of India kahan hai?
d: Gateway of India Mumbai mein Apollo Bunder waterfront par sthit hai. Isse King George V aur Queen Mary ki 1911 ki India yatra ki yaad mein banaya gaya. Construction 1924 mein complete hui. Yahan se Elephanta Caves ke liye boats chalti hain. Yeh Mumbai ka iconic landmark hai.

q: Sabse kathor (hardest) padarth kaun sa hai?
d: Heera (Diamond) duniya ka sabse kathor (hardest) naturally occurring substance hai. Mohs hardness scale par iska rating 10 (maximum) hai. Yeh pure carbon se bana hota hai. Industrial diamonds ka upyog cutting aur drilling mein hota hai. Asli heera bahut giraan hota hai.

q: Ramlala Mandir kahan hai?
d: Ram Mandir Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh mein sthit hai. January 2024 mein PM Narendra Modi ne iska pran pratishtha kiya. Yeh wahi jagah hai jahan Hindu manyata ke anusar Bhagwan Ram ka janam hua tha. Mandir ka nirman pari traditional Nagara style mein kiya gaya hai aur 70 acres mein phela hua hai.

q: Sona ka chemical sign kya hai?
d: Sone (Gold) ka chemical symbol Au hai jo Latin word 'Aurum' se aaya hai. Iska atomic number 79 hai. Ag (Silver/Chandi), Fe (Iron/Loha) aur Cu (Copper/Tamba) hain. Sona ek precious metal hai jo oxidize nahi hota isliye zamaane se valuable raha hai. India mein sona bahut shubh mana jata hai.

q: Kangaroo kis desh ka rashtriya pashu hai?
d: Kangaroo Australia ka rashtriya pashu hai aur wahan sirf yahi paya jata hai. Yeh ek marsupial hai - iska bachcha (joey) uske pet ki theli (pouch) mein palta hai. Yeh apni powerful hind legs se 70 km/h ki speed se kud sakta hai. Australia ki currency aur coat of arms par bhi kangaroo hai.

q: World War 2 kab khatam hua?
d: World War 2 officially 2 September 1945 ko Japan ke surrender ke saath khatam hua. European theatre mein war 8 May 1945 ko Germany ke surrender se khatam hua. America ne Japan par 6 aur 9 August 1945 ko atomic bombs giraaye. Yeh history ka sabse bada aur vinaashkaari yudh tha.

q: Mount Everest kis desh mein hai?
d: Mount Everest Nepal aur Tibet (China) ki seema par sthit hai lekin iska main peak Nepal ki taraf hai. Iska Nepali naam Sagarmatha hai. Edmund Hillary (New Zealand) aur Tenzing Norgay (Nepal) ne 29 May 1953 ko pehli baar summit kiya. Bachendri Pal pehli Indian mahila thi jinhone 1984 mein Everest summit kiya.

q: ATM ki full form kya hai?
d: ATM ka full form Automated Teller Machine hai. Pehla ATM 1967 mein London mein Barclays Bank ne lagaya tha. India mein pehla ATM 1987 mein Mumbai mein HSBC Bank ne lagaya. ATM se paise nikalne, balance check karne aur fund transfer karne ki suvidha milti hai.

q: IPL ka pehla season kisne jeeta?
d: 2008 mein pehle IPL season mein Rajasthan Royals ne Mumbai Indians ko final mein haraaya tha. Shane Warne Rajasthan Royals ke captain the. Saurav Ganguly KKR ke captain the. IPL ko BCCI ke VP Lalit Modi ne design kiya tha. Aaj IPL duniya ki sabse valuable cricket league hai.

q: Rabindranath Tagore ne kya likha?
d: Jana Gana Mana jo India ka Rashtreey Gaan (National Anthem) hai use Rabindranath Tagore ne likha. Pehli baar yeh 27 December 1911 ko gaya gaya. Sare Jahan Se Achha Muhammad Iqbal ne likha. Tagore Nobel Prize jeetne wale pehle non-European the jo 1913 mein milaa.

q: Duniya ki sabse unchi statue kaun si hai?
d: Statue of Unity Gujarat, India mein Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel ki murti hai. Iska height 182 meter (597 feet) hai jo Statue of Liberty se do guna zyada hai. Yeh 2018 mein inaugurate ki gayi. Iska design Ram V. Sutar ne banaya. Yahan se Narmada dam aur Satpura Vindhya pahadiyan dikhti hain.

q: Yoga Day kab manaya jata hai?
d: International Yoga Day 21 June ko manaya jata hai. PM Narendra Modi ki proposal par UN ne 2014 mein ise approve kiya aur pehla Yoga Day 21 June 2015 ko manaya gaya. 21 June Summer Solstice hota hai jo saal ka sabse lamba din hota hai. Yoga ki utpatti India mein 5000+ saal pehle hui.

q: Google ke CEO kaun hain?
d: Sundar Pichai (janam: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, 1972) Google ke CEO hain. Unhone 2015 mein yeh post sambhali. Satya Nadella Microsoft ke CEO hain aur Tim Cook Apple ke CEO hain. Sundar Pichai ne IIT Kharagpur se padhai ki aur baad mein Stanford aur Wharton se bhi degree li.

q: Bharat ka sabse chota rajya kaun sa hai?
d: Goa area ke hisaab se India ka sabse chhota state hai jiska area sirf 3,702 square kilometer hai. Population ke hisaab se Sikkim sabse chhota hai. Goa 1961 tak Portuguese colony tha. Yeh apne beaches, churches aur kasinos ke liye famous hai. Panaji ya Panjim Goa ki rajdhani hai.

q: Chand par kadam rakhne wala pehla vyakti kaun tha?
d: Neil Armstrong pehle insaan the jinhoone 20 July 1969 ko Apollo 11 mission ke dauran Chand par kadam rakha. Unka mashoor vakya tha 'That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind.' Buzz Aldrin unke saath the. Yuri Gagarin pehle aadmi the jo space mein gaye (1961). Rakesh Sharma pehle Indian astronaut hain (1984).

q: Pencil mein kya hota hai?
d: Pencil mein Graphite hota hai na ki Lead (seesa) jaise log galti se samajhte hain. Graphite carbon ka ek form hai. Isme clay bhi milayi jaati hai - jitni zyada clay, utni hard pencil. HB pencil standard hai. Graphite ki khoj 1565 mein England ke Borrowdale mein hui thi.

q: DNA ka full form kya hai?
d: DNA ka full form Deoxyribonucleic Acid hai. Yeh double helix structure mein hota hai jo James Watson aur Francis Crick ne 1953 mein discover kiya. DNA mein hi hamare genetic information hoti hai. Har insaan ka DNA unique hota hai. Forensic science mein DNA testing se criminals ko pakda jata hai.

q: India ka sabse purana shaher kaun sa hai?
d: Varanasi (Kashi/Banaras) duniya ke sabse purane continuously inhabited cities mein se ek hai. Mark Twain ne kaha tha 'Varanasi is older than history, older than tradition, older even than legend.' Ganga nadi ke kinare sthit yeh 3000+ saal purana shahar hai. Yahan Kashi Vishwanath Mandir aur Sarnath sthit hain.

q: Bharat ka sabse bada rajya (by area) kaun sa hai?
d: Rajasthan 342,239 square kilometer ke saath India ka sabse bada state hai. Isme Thar Desert hai jo Asia ka sabse bada desert hai. Jaipur (Pink City) iska rajdhani hai. Rajasthan apne mahal, kilei (forts), oonth safari aur rang-birangi sanskriti ke liye mashoor hai. Population mein Uttar Pradesh sabse bada state hai.

q: Hawa mein sabse zyada kaun sa gas hota hai?
d: Vayu mandal mein sabse zyada Nitrogen hai jo lagbhag 78% hai. Uske baad Oxygen 21%, Argon 0.9% aur CO2 0.04% hai. Oxygen sunne wala gas hai isi liye hum jeete hain. Nitrogen ek inert gas hai jo zyada reactive nahi hoti. Plants mein nitrogen cycle ke through nitrogen pahunchi hai.

q: Sabse bada mahadeep (Continent) kaun sa hai?
d: Asia duniya ka sabse bada mahadeep hai jo Prithvi ki 30% land surface par hai. Isme duniya ki do sabse zyada abadi wale desh China aur India hain. Sabse unchi jagah (Everest) aur Caspian Sea (sabse badi lake) bhi Asia mein hain. Dead Sea jo duniya mein sabse neeche hai woh bhi Asia mein hai.
